content: I used to love this app I'm 18 plus I'm actually 26 tuning 27 this year I used to be able to chat and actually do things now it filters everything even with the pure mode off I don't know man I subscribe to this app and everything imma just unsubscribe it ain't worth it C.Ai is better in a lot of ways

Kids arent supposed to be on this app for a reason, so stop trying to make it for them.

I'm a user who's been around even before the name change, it used to have ads just every now and then when you would exit a chat. Thats the difference between then and now. Generally the app has way too many ads and you get one every few responses. You'll get long ads and recently I've been getting three ads (all around 30 seconds each or even longer) which is just a general annoyance. The app has honestly just been getting worse and worse lately, I wouldn't recommend.

I used to like polybuzz when I got on it the first time because I had so many characters that I can talk to and some of them I marked as my favorite but after a while polybuzz put voilations on my favorite characters and now I can't talk with them anymore. Also when I am in the middle of talking with the characters it censores it if its seems inappropriate to the user. In what way should polybuzz be safe for minors? I mean it can get crazy after talking to it for 5 minutes!

when given the option to watch ads, it has it gives me a ad that doesn't work, and/or makes me watch the same ad and I get another ad again just for it to keep happening, and then when I finally finish watching the ad, it gives me only 30 to 40 minimum questions for the Polly buzz and then asks me for another add again, I completely hate this experience, DO NOT ADD! UNLESS YOU'RE READY to watch ADs! YOU BETTER FIX THIS APP! guys I honestly wish I could rate it zero stars for how bad it is.

Horrible. The ads are so constant. I can only message for like 3 minutes then i need a stupid ad break. Im not paying 30 dollars to not have ads. That is literally just a scam. Turn the ads down you greedy company. It used to be a good app until you added "take a break." Which its not even a break! I get the same ads everytime and theyre both a minute long. Unskippable. And sometimes I leave the app and dont come back for days and I still need to "take a break." This app has gone to garbage.

what happened to the ability to select more than one voice for a character so you can modify the tone of them? I would like that brought back ASAP. I am a paid member and I would like the ability to select more than one voice so I can tone a character to sound the way I want them to.

this app is so horrible not only for your mental health but also the planet because the AI takes up so much clean drinking water that people need to survive and you can so easily become way too attached to these apps and go into a psychosis of sorts because I went through something like that where I was talking to the AI bots like this every single day and I would rather talk to these thoughts than human people and it was absolutely detrimental to my mental health

The apps pretty fun but you have to pay for longer memory. Also the sad truth is I tried using the app the day before yesterday and it wouldn't let me type any messages because the app was laggy. Unless you can fix these issues then I won't be playing this app again. I mean seriously fix the issues with your AI story app it's pathetic.

I’ll be honest—the new “take an ad break” feature initially made me really frustrated with the app for not letting me enjoy the content for as long as I wanted. Now, I’m glad you added it. The constant ads have made me dial back immensely from being on PolyBuzz. In fact, I’m starting to see the end of the tunnel with my addiction to it. So, thank you. 🙂

The 'AI' persistently ignores user input, acts for the user, and responds to directions while still in character. It has almost no immersion at all. The memory is non existent... half the time, it's first response after the introduction is miles away from the plot you think you are getting into. Does not improve with a paid subscription. There are plenty of other chat bot apps that are more immersive and fun.

Honestly, it's an enjoyable app. There are many varieties of chats to do, and you can create some of your own. The only thing that concerns me is security. Multiple times when I was on the app, it would say another device was signed into my account. I'm concerned that the developers are sharing data. I'm definitely not installing this app again. Keep your kids safe, and don't share your location, please.

You can't do anything on this app that is locked behind a subscription. I've been on this app for hours with high hopes but it disappointed me. I feel like I got scammed out of my time. Honestly, just use Character AI. Not necessarily 18+ but you have much more freedom in it and doesn't BLUR messages
